query: How many times, and on exactly which dates, was the Moscow (Kapotnya / Moskovsky NPZ / Gazpromneft Moscow) oil refinery struck by drones in May-June 2026? List each confirmed strike date and note any unconfirmed/disputed dates.
answer:
## Answer

The Moscow (Kapotnya / Moskovsky NPZ / Gazprom Neft) oil refinery was struck by Ukrainian drones **three times** in May–June 2026, all confirmed:

| # | Date | Status | Key details |
|---|------|--------|-------------|
| 1 | **May 17, 2026** (Sunday) | Confirmed | Drone hit the refinery entrance/facility during a then-record attack on Moscow (3–4 killed, 12+ wounded); plant shut down "for security reasons" per Reuters |
| 2 | **June 16, 2026** (Tuesday) | Confirmed | 9th consecutive day of attacks; Sobyanin confirmed a drone damaged a refinery facility; operations suspended; Zelenskyy confirmed the ~500 km strike |
| 3 | **June 18, 2026** (Thursday) | Confirmed | Largest drone attack on Moscow of the war (~200 drones, 194 downed over Moscow); ELOU-AVT-6 unit and fuel tanks hit, halting crude processing; 2nd refinery strike that week |

**Aftermath:** Reuters (June 24) reported the refinery unlikely to resume production before 2027; by late June ~one-third of Russia's national refining capacity was offline.

**On disputed/unconfirmed dates — there are none that are genuinely contested:**
- One **NBC News** article contains a *day-of-week wording inconsistency* (mixing "Tuesday" and "Thursday"), but all consolidated sources agree the two June strikes were June 16 and June 18.
- The **KÜRE Encyclopedia** lists only "two attacks" (June 16 and 18), **omitting May 17** — but May 17 is independently confirmed by Meduza's timeline, Bloomberg, NPR, and Reuters.
- No confirmed refinery strikes occurred in May other than May 17.

Sources cross-validated across Meduza (consolidated timeline), CNN, NBC, ABC, Kyiv Post, Bloomberg, NPR, Reuters (via Militarnyi/NV.ua), and defence-industry.eu.

sources.title: How Ukraine's drone attacks on Moscow have escalated — a timeline
sources.snippet: Consolidated timeline confirming Kapotnya refinery strikes on May 17 (drone hit entrance), June 16 (fire, suspended operations), and June 18 (second fire in two days) 2026.

sources.title: Moscow refinery attack: Ukrainian drones hit Kapotnya in biggest attack in years
sources.snippet: Drones hit the refinery 'for the second time this week' on June 18; contains a Tuesday/Thursday day-of-week wording inconsistency.

sources.title: Ukraine launches largest attack on Moscow since start of full-scale war
sources.snippet: At least 194 drones downed over Moscow into Thursday June 18; largest drone offensive on Moscow of the war, damaging the refinery.

sources.title: Moscow mayor says dozens of Ukrainian drones downed in attack on Russian capital
sources.snippet: June 16, 2026 (ninth consecutive day); Sobyanin said a drone damaged a facility at the Moscow Refinery in Kapotnya.

sources.title: Ukraine strikes Moscow oil refinery in large-scale drone attack
sources.snippet: June 18 large-scale attack; Russia's MoD said it shot down at least 555 Ukrainian drones nationwide.

sources.title: Ukrainian drone strikes halted refining at Moscow's Kapotnya oil refinery after damaging key units and fuel tanks
sources.snippet: Confirms June 16 and June 18 strikes; June 18 damaged the ELOU-AVT-6 unit and fuel tanks, halting crude processing; lists FP-1, Liutyi, Bober, Behemot, Morok, Bars drones.

sources.title: Historic May 17 drone strikes shut down Moscow oil refinery
sources.snippet: Moscow oil refinery temporarily shut down 'for security reasons' following the May 17 Ukrainian drone attack, citing Reuters.

sources.title: Ukraine conducts large-scale drone strikes on Russia, killing 4 and wounding 12 others
sources.snippet: May 17, 2026 large-scale drone attack on Moscow region; killed 4, wounded 12.

sources.title: Record Drone Attack on Moscow Kills Three, Targets Refinery
sources.snippet: May 17, 2026 record drone attack on Moscow killed three and targeted a refinery.

sources.title: Moscow's Biggest Oil Refinery Near Kremlin Hit Again as Drone Raid Sparks Fires Across Russian Capital
sources.snippet: Refinery struck for the second time in a week (June 18); supplies up to 40% of Moscow's fuel; 194 drones intercepted.

sources.title: Moscow Refinery Unlikely To Resume Operations After Drone Strikes Until 2027 — Reuters
sources.snippet: Reuters (June 24): refinery unlikely to resume production this year, out at least six months, possibly until 2027.

sources.title: 2026 Moscow Oil Refinery Drone Attacks | KÜRE Encyclopedia
sources.snippet: Describes two separate UAV attacks on the Kapotnya refinery on 16 June and 18 June 2026 (omits the May 17 strike).

sources.title: Ukraine Drone Blitz Burns Moscow Refinery: One-Third of Russian Refining Goes Offline
sources.snippet: June 18 attack halted the Gazprom Neft refinery until at least 2027; ~one-third of Russia's national refining capacity offline by late June.

sources.title: Drone Strikes Force Central Russian Refineries to Halt or Cut Output – Reuters
sources.snippet: Central Russian refineries suspended or cut output after two weeks of drone attacks (as of May 20); gasoline export ban to July 31.

data_points.metric: Confirmed drone strikes on Kapotnya/Moscow refinery in May-June 2026
Drones downed over Moscow during June 18 attack (Sobyanin)
Ukrainian drones Russia's MoD claimed to have downed nationwide on June 18
Share of Moscow's fuel/gasoline market supplied by the refinery
People killed in the May 17 record drone attack on Moscow
Expected minimum time refinery out of operation after June strikes
Share of Russia's national refining capacity offline by late June 2026
